results.title: Vernon Kay bids ‘emotional’ farewell as BBC Radio 2 star decides to ‘step back’ from role
results.description: Vernon Kay gave an "emotional" goodbye as a BBC Radio 2 presenter made the big decision to "step back" from his role on the radio station, with Vernon admitting that the news made the crew emotional

results.title: Angry Ginge breaks down in tears over mum's devastating house fire after pets 'didn't make it'
results.description: The I'm A Celeb winner revealed his mum's house tragically burned down hours before he played Soccer Aid in London
